instruction: Share your review of a newly opened coffee shop in your area. Your response must contain exactly 150 words. Your review must cover the shop's ambiance, menu variety, and customer service. Begin your review with the phrase "Stepping into this coffee shop," and conclude with the phrase "a delightful addition to the neighborhood." Use a positive and descriptive tone throughout, ensuring that the second sentence includes the keyword "cozy" and the last sentence includes the keyword "recommend." Additionally, capitalize the name of the coffee shop and ensure all other words are in lowercase. Do not use the keyword "delightful" in your review.
response: Stepping into this coffee shop, you immediately feel the warmth of the space. The interior is incredibly cozy, with soft lighting and comfortable seating that invites lingering. The menu variety is impressive, offering everything from classic brews to unique specialty drinks made with high-quality beans. Staff members are friendly and attentive, ensuring every customer feels welcome from the moment they arrive. They take time to explain their favorite options and handle orders with care and speed. The atmosphere is perfect for working remotely or enjoying a quiet conversation with friends. Fresh pastries complement the excellent coffee selection, making it a great spot for breakfast or lunch. Prices are reasonable compared to the quality of food and drink provided. I truly enjoy the unique vibe that sets this place apart from others nearby. It has become my go-to spot for a relaxing afternoon break. I highly recommend visiting this new spot soon. It is a delightful addition to the neighborhood.

Conflicts between Keyword Constraints an.new_constraint: Do not use the keyword "delightful" in your review.
Conflicts between Keyword Constraints an.org_constraint: Conclude your review with the phrase "a delightful addition to the neighborhood."
